prestazioni: Engine swap to a **Proton CamPro CPS (CFE16)** 1.6L DOHC 16V with forged internals (Mahle pistons, Eagle H-beam rods, ACL race bearings) and a **Garrett GT2860RS** turbocharger (0.63 A/R turbine housing, 56 trim compressor) running 1.2 bar of boost, paired with a **Haltech Elite 2500** standalone ECU for precise fuel and ignition mapping.

Custom **3-inch stainless steel turbo-back exhaust** with a **Bosal 760-222** high-flow catalytic converter and a **Scorpion 4-2-1 header** (equal-length primaries, 1.5mm wall thickness) to optimize scavenging and spool characteristics for the CamPro CPS.

Suspension overhaul with **Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers** (24-way adjustable damping, 30mm drop) and **SuperPro polybushings** (front control arms, subframe, and rear trailing arms) to eliminate compliance and improve turn-in response, paired with **AP Racing CP5270 front brake calipers** (4-piston, 304mm discs) and **Ferodo DS2500 pads** for fade-resistant stopping power.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 (Pandem) widebody kit** (custom-fitted for the Sutera’s chassis, with 30mm extended front fenders and 40mm rear overfenders) in **3M Gloss Black (2010-10)** with **carbon fiber front splitter** and **rear diffuser** (both from **Seibon Carbon**).

**Work Emotion CR Kiwami** 17x8.5 ET35 wheels (5x114.3 PCD) wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2** (225/40 R17) with **Hankook Ventus R-S4** (225/45 R17) as daily tires, paired with **D2 Racing wheel spacers** (15mm front, 20mm rear) for aggressive flush fitment.

**Full custom interior** featuring **Recaro SPG XL** seats (with **Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses**), **Momo Mod.78** steering wheel (350mm, suede), and **Defi BF Advance** gauges (oil pressure, boost, and wideband AFR) mounted in a **custom carbon fiber A-pillar pod**, with **Dynamat Xtreme** sound deadening throughout.
